weight_path: INT8 payload and F32 row scales are read; each selected projection is reconstructed into a bounded F32 temporary buffer

temporary_buffers.scale_buffer: 768 or 2048 F32 values depending on projection
temporary_buffers.quantized_payload: streamed/read through selected expert ownership; no complete expert layer resident

reason: bounded scalar reconstruction is easiest to compare against the frozen F32 baseline and isolates quantization error before kernel optimization
